div.t-att-data-drivers: ','.join([str(d.id)+'|'+d.name for d in drivers] if drivers else [])

div.span: N/A Not Collected Collected – Not Remitted Remitted ✓

div.div: No changes allowed on this order

input.placeholder: e.g. ARS-2026-0042 — رقم مرجع شركة التوصيل (اختياري)

div.p: You don't have access to the Delivery Portal.

div.t-att-data-drivers: ','.join([str(d.id)+'|'+d.name for d in drivers] if drivers else [])

div.span: N/A Not Collected Collected – Not Remitted Remitted ✓

div.div: No changes allowed on this order

input.placeholder: e.g. ARS-2026-0042 — رقم مرجع شركة التوصيل (اختياري)

div.p: You don't have access to the Delivery Portal.

input.placeholder: Scan barcode or type order number...
e.g. ARS-2026-0042 — رقم مرجع شركة التوصيل (اختياري)
e.g. ARS-2026-0042 — رقم مرجع شركة التوصيل (اختياري)

t.div: ✅ لا توجد orders كاش جاهزة للتسوية

tr.td: 💵 Cash orders — carrier collects from customer
🌐 Online orders — no cash collection · delivery fee only

div.div:
💰
| Carrier Ref:
⏳ Pending Approval ✅ Settled ⚠️ Partial ❌ Rejected

tr.t-attf-style: {{ 'background:#f0fdf4;' if line.approval_state == 'approved' else 'background:#fffbeb;' if line.approval_state == 'noted' else 'background:#fff5f5;' if line.approval_state == 'rejected' else '' }}
